mapper.insert: INSERT INTO game_boxscore ( game_id, le_id, sr_id, season_id, crowd_cn, start_tm, end_tm, use_tm, max_inning, real_max_inning, home_season_w, home_season_l, home_season_d, away_season_w, away_season_l, away_season_d, home_hits, home_errors, home_walks, away_hits, away_errors, away_walks, finishing_hit, umpires ) VALUES ( #{gameId}, #{leId}, #{srId}, #{seasonId}, #{crowdCn}, #{startTm}, #{endTm}, #{useTm}, #{maxInning}, #{realMaxInning}, #{homeSeasonW}, #{homeSeasonL}, #{homeSeasonD}, #{awaySeasonW}, #{awaySeasonL}, #{awaySeasonD}, #{homeHits}, #{homeErrors}, #{homeWalks}, #{awayHits}, #{awayErrors}, #{awayWalks}, #{finishingHit}, #{umpires} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE le_id = VALUES(le_id), sr_id = VALUES(sr_id), season_id = VALUES(season_id), crowd_cn = VALUES(crowd_cn), start_tm = VALUES(start_tm), end_tm = VALUES(end_tm), use_tm = VALUES(use_tm), max_inning = VALUES(max_inning), real_max_inning = VALUES(real_max_inning), home_season_w = VALUES(home_season_w), home_season_l = VALUES(home_season_l), home_season_d = VALUES(home_season_d), away_season_w = VALUES(away_season_w), away_season_l = VALUES(away_season_l), away_season_d = VALUES(away_season_d), home_hits = VALUES(home_hits), home_errors = VALUES(home_errors), home_walks = VALUES(home_walks), away_hits = VALUES(away_hits), away_errors = VALUES(away_errors), away_walks = VALUES(away_walks), finishing_hit = VALUES(finishing_hit), umpires = VALUES(umpires), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
